summary: Unassign filled opening when candidate is deleted
description: Unassign filled opening when candidate is deleted. Endpoint: PATCH /c/{company_id}/requisitions/{requisition_id}/openings/{opening_id}/unassign. Required parameters: requisition_id, opening_id, company_id.
